title: betula × winteri
intro: Betula × winteri, also known as the hybrid silver birch, is a deciduous tree that belongs to the Betula genus, resulting from the cross-breeding of Betula pendula and Betula pubescens. The bark of the Betula × winteri plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Betula × winteri include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Betula × winteri can be found in the form of bark infusions, salves, and ointments, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation.
